content.en:
"Copy!"

Ye Tian spent some resources and copied the body of a third-order void beast.

When the time comes, he can completely hide a copy body in the body of a third-order Void Beast, so that he can hunt other Void Beasts, and easily evade the tracking of other Void Beasts.

Moreover, Ye Tian could also change the body of the Void Beast again and again, even if it was a fifth-order Void Beast, there was no way to find his existence.

This way, he was able to hunt down a large number of Void Beasts in a short period of time.

......

Somewhere in the Void Zone.

A first-order void beast was wandering aimlessly, and suddenly a third-order void beast appeared.

This third-order void beast was none other than Ye Tian.

When the first-order void beast saw the third-order void beast, it transmitted a wave of awe, and immediately silently prepared to avoid it.

But at this moment, the third-order void beast copied by Ye Tian immediately attacked the first-order void beast, and at the same time, the copied body also shuttled out of the body of the third-order void beast, and used the Will Eternal Technique to attack this third-order void beast.

Almost instantly, this first-order void beast was killed by Ye Tian in seconds.

Then, Ye Tian put away the corpse of this first-order void beast and entered the body of the third-order void beast again.

In the following days, Ye Tian used this method to kill a lot of first-order void beasts, and even occasionally attacked second-order void beasts, but he was never caught, after all, no 573 people would think that the fierce beast contained a third-order void beast.

After hunting many Void Beasts, Ye Tian was ready to rest for a while, refining these Void Beast materials to improve the fusion of will and body, and then continue hunting Void Beasts when the materials were used up.

As time passed, Ye Tian's will and body fused more and more.

However, the first-order Void Beast was not very helpful to Ye Tian, if he stepped into the four-step Immortal Realm Lord level, the first-order Void Beast was afraid that it would be useless, and then he could only use the second-order or even the third-order Void Beast.

After a long time, Ye Tian's Void Beast materials were all exhausted.

So on this day, he began to hunt the Void Beast again.

At this time, the fifth-order Void Beasts clearly knew that there were strong people hunting the Void Beasts, but they had nothing to do.

At first, they could not care much about such losses, but as a large number of second-order Void Beasts fell, they began to get anxious.

And whenever Ye Tian was exposed, he would immediately replace it with another third-order Void Beast.

After a long time, the fifth-order void beasts even suspected that many third-order void beasts were involved in such a hunt, and in the end, they were not allowed to restrain their subordinates, so that all their subordinates were not allowed to go out without permission.

In this way, Ye really had no way to hunt it.

But.

You can't hunt them, but you can't hunt them in the Void Zone, there are other Void Beasts.

Therefore, Ye Tian would not lack Void Beast materials at all.

One eternity after another years passed, and Ye Tian's strength became stronger and stronger.

After 300 eternal years, Ye Tian's will and body had already reached sixty percent, and at this time, even the second-order Void Beast was of no use to him.

Cultivating to reach the six-step Immortal Realm Lord realm, but his true strength is probably stronger than that of the nine-step Immortal Realm Lord.

Because Ye Tian, with the help of the Eternal Treasure Fragments, created two of the top Legendary Eternal Techniques.

One is the Void Step, which allows him to instantly cross the distant Void Region, and I am afraid that even the Legendary Lord is inferior to him in terms of speed.

This was a high-level application of the Eternal Space Dao, and without that Eternal Treasure Fragment, it would be difficult for Ye Tian to create such a top-notch Legendary Eternal Technique.

The second Legendary Eternal Technique is the Hundred Million Void, which is a spatial Legendary Eternal Technique that involves the will, creating a billions of worms in the Void to suppress the enemy, if the enemy's strength is weak, it will be directly shattered into nothingness.

In order to create these two legendary eternal techniques, Ye Tian spent 300 eternal years, and this was still with the help of the Eternal Treasure Fragment, if it was himself, he would not be able to create such legendary eternal techniques at all.

It is conceivable how powerful these two legendary eternal techniques are, far surpassing ordinary legendary eternal techniques.

With these two top-notch Legendary Eternal Techniques, plus other Legendary Eternal Techniques and a large number of Will Eternal Techniques, even if the cultivation only reached the six-step Immortal Realm Lord, it was far superior to the other Immortal Realm Lords.

Many Immortal Realm Lords are afraid that they don't even know one Legendary Eternal Technique, or only one or two.

"In the Origin Sea Space-Time Territory Territory, my strength is probably second only to the six Legendary Lords!"

Ye Tian muttered.

this day.

Ye Tian was ready to leave the depths of the Void Zone, there was no need to continue to stay here.

The first- and second-order Void Beasts were of little use to him, and if he wanted to kill the third-order Void Beasts, he couldn't do it instantly, and if he was given time to the third-order Void Beasts, the fifth-order Void Beasts would come.

So, he wasn't ready to continue hunting the Void Beast.

Even if you can improve the fusion of your will and body by relying on the materials of the Void Beast, it is difficult to use the materials of the Void Beast to impact the Legendary Lord realm.

The six legendary lords of the space-time territory definitely did not rely on the Void Beast material to break through.

There are still many unknown opportunities in the space-time territory, and some are not necessarily inferior to those of the Void Beast.

this day.

Ye Tian's replica body in the ruins world rushed out of the ruins world, and the other void beasts couldn't intercept it at all.

Subsequently, this replica body hid in the body of a third-order void beast, evading the pursuit of the fifth-order void beast.

Then, this third-order void beast took Ye Tian away from this area and shuttled towards the source sea space-time territory.

I saw Ye Tian perform the Void Step, his body crossed the distant Void Region, and it didn't take long for him to return to the space-time territory, and he also successfully brought back that piece of Eternal Treasure Fragment.

Dark Forbidden Realm.

Ye Tian placed the Eternal Treasure Fragment here, and used the Eternal Treasure Fragment to create an Eternal Treasure Fragment, only the true core members of the Human Race had the opportunity to enter here to cultivate, and his body has always guarded here, using the Eternal Treasure Fragment to cultivate all the time.

He didn't want to carry such an Eternal Arcana Fragment on the body of the replica, if it fell in the space-time territory or other treasure land, wouldn't the Eternal Arcana Fragment be lost?

Therefore, it is undoubtedly the safest way to place such an eternal treasure fragment in the Dark Forbidden Realm.

this day.

Ye Tian was going to choose a space-time territory in the space-time territory as his own territory, after all, in the future, the human race was born in the half-step Eternal Realm or the Extreme Realm, and it could also be brought into the space-time territory to practice, so he must have his own space-time territory.

After all, any lord of the space-time territory has his own space-time territory, and he has become the lord of the immortal realm, if he does not have his own space-time territory, it would be strange. _
